name: r-hidden-preview
description: Automatically run selected R code in the background and preview results inline and in a panel.

commands.title: R Hidden Preview: Open Preview Panel

rHiddenPreview.rscriptPath.description: Path to Rscript executable. You can use a full path if Rscript is not in PATH.

rHiddenPreview.timeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for each background preview execution.

rHiddenPreview.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds before triggering preview after selection changes.

rHiddenPreview.autoPreview.description: Enable automatic preview on selection changes.

rHiddenPreview.enableHoverPreview.description: Enable optional hover preview. When enabled, hovering R expressions shows quick preview like IntelliSense.

rHiddenPreview.safeAutoExecutionOnly.description: If enabled, auto preview only runs for expressions passing the built-in safe rule engine (isSafeExpression).

rHiddenPreview.safeFunctionBlacklist.description: Function call blacklist used by safe auto execution (case-insensitive). Any matched function call will be skipped.

rHiddenPreview.safeFunctionWhitelist.description: Optional function call whitelist for safe auto execution (case-insensitive). When non-empty, only listed function calls are allowed.

rHiddenPreview.contextMode.markdownDescription: Execution context mode. `selectionOnly`: run only selected code. `documentBeforeSelection`: run code from document start to selection start, then run selected code. This can execute extra code and may cause side effects.

rHiddenPreview.maxOutputLength.description: Maximum output length for summary and detail text. Extra output is truncated.

rHiddenPreview.showInlinePreview.description: Show one-line summary as inline end-of-line preview decoration.

rHiddenPreview.showPanelPreview.description: Show detailed preview in a dedicated detail view beside the editor.

rHiddenPreview.requireWorkspaceTrust.description: If enabled, auto preview runs only in trusted workspaces.

rHiddenPreview.ignoreIncompleteSelection.description: If enabled, skip execution when selection looks incomplete (for example unbalanced brackets or unfinished expression).
